About the Creator


Hello! I’m Cameron Oviedo. I created Paleoexotic to explore Earth’s history during the Paleozoic Era.


This project combines my interests in web design and prehistoric history. I want to make learning about the past fun and easy to understand.


A major inspiration for this site is the Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, which shares incredible research and exhibits about Earth’s past.

Skills & Interest

Web Design HTML CSS Responsive Design Science Prehistoric Life Digital Media

Project Goals

Education

Provide an accessible introduction to the Paleozoic era and the major evolutionary events that shaped life on Earth.

Design Practice

Practice modern web design techniques including semantic HTML, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and responsive layout strategies.

Creative Exploration

Combine visuals, video, and layout design to make history topics more engaging for viewers.

© 2026 Cameron Oviedo | Paleoexotic
